recommendations.title: Mortal Engines

recommendations.title: The Eight Hundred
recommendations.overview: In 1937, eight hundred Chinese soldiers fight under siege from a warehouse in the middle of the Shanghai battlefield, completely surrounded by the Japanese army.

recommendations.title: Tangerines
recommendations.overview: War in Abkhazia, 1992. An Estonian man Ivo has stayed behind to harvest his crops of tangerines. In a bloody conflict at his door, a wounded man is left behind, and Ivo is forced to take him in.

recommendations.title: ARQ
recommendations.overview: Two old friends living in a dystopic future become trapped in a mysterious time loop — one that may have something to do with an ongoing battle between an omnipotent corporation and a ragtag band of rebels.

recommendations.title: The Darkest Hour
recommendations.overview: In Moscow, five young people lead the charge against an alien race which has attacked Earth via our power supply.

recommendations.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
recommendations.overview: An alien is left behind on Earth and saved by the 10-year-old Elliott who decides to keep him hidden in his home. While a task force hunts for the extra-terrestrial, Elliott, his brother, and his little sister Gertie form an emotional bond with their

recommendations.title: The Breath
recommendations.overview: A small task force of the Turkish army have to defend a relay station in the middle of nowhere against a possible terrorist raid.

recommendations.title: Prospect
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl and her father travel to a remote alien moon, aiming to strike it rich. They've secured a contract to harvest a large deposit of the elusive gems hidden in the depths of the moon's toxic forest. But there are others roving the wilderne

recommendations.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
recommendations.overview: An alien and a robot land on Earth after World War II and tell mankind to be peaceful or face destruction.

recommendations.title: Appleseed Alpha
